tests.detail: PASS: local Claude/Codex Superpowers installs are pinned to https://github.com/oxydavid-maxx/superpowers@6.0.3-vmodel.12

notes: Implemented S4_BUILD only. Did not edit spec/test-design/release/push files. pin-local-fork-install.ps1 was run locally to exercise Repin-ClaudeSkillRegistry and update the live registry before running verify-local-fork-install.ps1. Fixed a backslash-doubling bug in the plan's proposed regex replacement — used $activePath + "\skills\" instead of the plan's double-escaped form, which would have written double-backslashes into registry.yaml.
